title: cactus-compute/needle
friendlyTitle: A very small AI model for calling tools locally
summary: Needle is an open 26-million-parameter function-calling model intended for very small devices. The repository had about 3.1k stars at review time and was among the day’s trending AI projects.
friendlySummary: Needle is a small open AI model made to call functions on tiny devices. It is popular on GitHub today.
whyItMatters: It offers a starting point for experimenting with compact, local tool-calling systems where cloud latency, cost or connectivity is a constraint. Treat its small size as a trade-off to test against the reliability needed for a real workflow.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Developers can try it when they need a lightweight local AI tool and do not want every task to depend on a cloud service.
